title: Imperial Stardrive Museum
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Coruscant Museum}}
The '''Imperial Stardrive Museum''' was an institution on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Rebellion era]]. Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the Museum held different antiques, including several [[C-73 Tracker starfighter]]s.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
